## Verification Instructions

### For each page, verify:
- [ ] Page loads (HTTP 200)
- [ ] Renders correctly (no console errors)
- [ ] Mobile responsive
- [ ] All images load
- [ ] All links functional
- [ ] Forms submit correctly
- [ ] CTAs work as expected

## Recommended Verification Schedule

| Page Type | Frequency | Notes |
|-----------|-----------|-------|
| Homepage | Weekly | Primary entry point |
| Landing pages | Before/after changes | Howard Operator OS |
| Store/Checkout | Daily when live | Revenue-critical |
| Contact/About | Monthly | Static content |

## Verification Tools

- **Manual:** Browser check + mobile test
- **Automated:** Lighthouse, uptime monitor (future)
- **Link checker:** W3C Link Checker or similar
